behaviors.terrain: Standard walkable/blocking terrain. Solidity per block from brightness bit.
behaviors.tube: Transport tube - carries BLOB upward automatically when entered.
behaviors.hazard: Lethal zone - instant kill on contact.
behaviors.ray: Periodic hazard - cycles on/off, safe during off phase (electrodes).
behaviors.pickup: Item pickup location - collectible spawns here.
behaviors.teleport: Teleporter booth - entering triggers code-entry UI for fast travel.
behaviors.crumble: Breakable/crumbling platform - collapses after player stands on it.
behaviors.marker: Invisible gameplay marker - no graphics, triggers runtime behavior.
